title: GAO-22-103815 (Condensed Summary): Disability Medical Consultant Oversight
description: Short internal condensation of GAO-22-103815 ('Actions Needed by SSA to Ensure Disability Medical Consultants Are Properly Screened and Trained'), capturing title, date, source URL, focus area (medical-consultant performance and oversight in disability determination), and key recommendation areas (disability-determination process improvements, state DDS performance oversight, processing-time reductions). A few-line synthesis for quick reference, not GAO's own published Highlights.

source.title: Actions Needed by SSA to Ensure Disability Medical Consultants Are Properly Screened and Trained (GAO-22-103815) — condensed summary

notes: Computed: this -summary file is OUR own brief condensation (templated 'Report:' card with Focus Area / Key Recommendation Areas), NOT GAO's published Highlights — so it is synthesis, tiered Computed rather than Authoritative. The file states 'Date: 2022' (the GAO product number prefix), but the report was published/released Nov 09, 2021; temporal_coverage uses the publication year (2021). For authoritative content see the base (oversight/gao/gao-22-103815) and full report (oversight/gao/gao-22-103815-full).
